## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest -ra` passes
- [ ] No new runtime dependency
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Tests added for new behavior; existing tests still pass
- [ ] No backward-incompatible schema change, or major-version bump planned
